tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Sting - Fortress around your heart (1985)

Based on YouTube link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ePTpHFjYNdI

4/4
120 bpm

[Intro]
[ch]D5/G[/ch]  [ch]C5/G[/ch]  [ch]Gm9[/ch]  [ch]C5/G[/ch]
[ch]D5/G[/ch]  [ch]C5/G[/ch]  [ch]Gm9[/ch]  [ch]C5/G[/ch]
[ch]D5/G[/ch]  [ch]C5/G[/ch]  [ch]Gm9[/ch]  [ch]C5/G[/ch]
[ch]D5/G[/ch]  [ch]C5/G[/ch]  [ch]Gm9[/ch]  [ch]C5/G[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]D5/G[/ch]        [ch]C5/G[/ch]       [ch]Gm9[/ch]      [ch]C5/G[/ch]
  Under the ruins of a walled city[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5/G[/ch]        [ch]C5/G[/ch]         [ch]Gm9[/ch]           [ch]C5/G[/ch]
  Crumbling towers and beams of yellow light[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5/G[/ch]      [ch]C5/G[/ch]          [ch]Gm9[/ch]        [ch]C5/G[/ch]
  No flags of truce, no cries of pity[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5/G[/ch]        [ch]C5/G[/ch]               [ch]Gm9[/ch]                  [ch]C5/G[/ch]
  The siege guns have been pounding through the nights[/tab]

[tab][ch]Eb7[/ch]         [ch]Ab/Eb[/ch]  [ch]Eb7[/ch]           [ch]Ab/Eb[/ch]
  It took a day to build the city[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb7[/ch]         [ch]Ab/Eb[/ch]                      [ch]Eb7[/ch]        [ch]Ab/Eb[/ch]
  We walked through its streets in the afternoon[/tab]

[tab][ch]C#5/F#[/ch]     [ch]B5/F#[/ch]          [ch]F#m9[/ch]            [ch]B5/F#[/ch]
  As I returned across the fields I'd known[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#5/F#[/ch]     [ch]B5/F#[/ch]         [ch]F#m9[/ch]          [ch]B5/F#[/ch]
  I recognized the walls that I'd once made[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#5/F#[/ch]    [ch]B5/F#[/ch]      [ch]F#m9[/ch]         [ch]B5/F#[/ch]
  Had to stop in my tracks for fear[/tab]

[tab][ch]B7[/ch]          [ch]G#m/B[/ch]  [ch]B7[/ch]        [ch]G#m/B[/ch]
 Of walking on the mines I'd laid[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]D/F#[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
And if I built this fortress around your heart[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]D/F#[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
Encircled you in trenches and barbed wire[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]D/F#[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
Then let me build a bridge,   for I cannot fill the chasm[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Cm7[/ch]    [ch]Dm7[/ch]     [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]         [ch]Fadd2[/ch]
And let me set the battlements on fire[/tab]

[Interlude]
[ch]D5/G[/ch]  [ch]C5/G[/ch]  [ch]Gm9[/ch]  [ch]C5/G[/ch]
[ch]D5/G[/ch]  [ch]C5/G[/ch]  [ch]Gm9[/ch]  [ch]C5/G[/ch]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]D5/G[/ch]          [ch]C5/G[/ch]   [ch]Gm9[/ch]          [ch]C5/G[/ch]
  Then I went off to fight some battle[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5/G[/ch]         [ch]C5/G[/ch]      [ch]Gm9[/ch]        [ch]C5/G[/ch]
  That I'd invented inside my head[/tab]

[tab][ch]Eb7[/ch]   [ch]Ab/Eb[/ch]       [ch]Eb7[/ch]            [ch]Ab/Eb[/ch]
 Away so long for years and years[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb7[/ch]          [ch]Ab/Eb[/ch]            [ch]Eb7[/ch]               [ch]Ab/Eb[/ch]
 You probably thought or even wished that I was dead[/tab]

[tab][ch]C#5/F#[/ch]     [ch]B5/F#[/ch]     [ch]F#m9[/ch]         [ch]B5/F#[/ch]
 While the armies all are sleeping[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#5/F#[/ch]      [ch]B5/F#[/ch]      [ch]F#m9[/ch]      [ch]B5/F#[/ch]
 Beneath the tattered flag we'd made[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#5/F#[/ch]   [ch]B5/F#[/ch]    [ch]F#m9[/ch]       [ch]B5/F#[/ch]
 I had to stop my tracks for fear[/tab]

[tab][ch]B7[/ch]          [ch]G#m/B[/ch]  [ch]B7[/ch]        [ch]G#m/B[/ch]
 Of walking on the mines I'd laid[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]D/F#[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
And if I built this fortress around your heart[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]D/F#[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
Encircled you in trenches and barbed wire[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]D/F#[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
Then let me build a bridge,   for I cannot fill the chasm[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Cm7[/ch]    [ch]Dm7[/ch]     [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]         [ch]Fadd2[/ch]
And let me set the battlements on fire[/tab]

[Interlude]
[ch]D5/G[/ch]  [ch]C5/G[/ch]  [ch]Gm9[/ch]  [ch]C5/G[/ch]
[ch]D5/G[/ch]  [ch]C5/G[/ch]  [ch]Gm9[/ch]  [ch]C5/G[/ch]
[ch]D5/G[/ch]  [ch]C5/G[/ch]  [ch]Gm9[/ch]  [ch]C5/G[/ch]
[ch]D5/G[/ch]  [ch]C5/G[/ch]  [ch]Gm9[/ch]  [ch]C5/G[/ch]

[Verse 3]

[tab][ch]D5/G[/ch]              [ch]C5/G[/ch]    [ch]Gm9[/ch]           [ch]C5/G[/ch]
   This prison has now become your home[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5/G[/ch]          [ch]C5/G[/ch]        [ch]Gm9[/ch]         [ch]C5/G[/ch]
   A sentence you seem prepared to pay[/tab]

[tab][ch]Eb7[/ch]        [ch]Ab/Eb[/ch]  [ch]Eb7[/ch]          [ch]Ab/Eb[/ch]
 It took a day to build the city[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb7[/ch]        [ch]Ab/Eb[/ch]               [ch]Eb7[/ch]          [ch]Ab/Eb[/ch]
 We walked through its streets in the afternoon[/tab]

[tab][ch]C#5/F#[/ch]    [ch]B5/F#[/ch]           [ch]F#m9[/ch]        [ch]B5/F#[/ch]
 As I returned across the lands I'd known[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#5/F#[/ch]    [ch]B5/F#[/ch]             [ch]F#m9[/ch]        [ch]B5/F#[/ch]
 I recognized the fields where I'd once played[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#5/F#[/ch]  [ch]B5/F#[/ch]      [ch]F#m9[/ch]       [ch]B5/F#[/ch]
 Had to stop in my tracks for fear[/tab]

[tab][ch]B7[/ch]          [ch]G#m/B[/ch]  [ch]B7[/ch]        [ch]G#m/B[/ch]
 Of walking on the mines I'd laid[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]D/F#[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]

[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]D/F#[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
Encircled you in trenches and barbed wire[/tab]

Then let me build a bridge,   for I cannot fill the chasm[/tab]
